channel.title: Critical Infrastructure on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Critical Infrastructure on simeononsecurity

item.title: Flock Safety Camera Security Vulnerabilities: Critical Analysis of 50+ Discovered Flaws in 2026
item.category: "Security Research" , "Vulnerability Analysis" , "Surveillance Technology" , "Cybersecurity" , "Privacy Security" , "IoT Security" , "Physical Security" , "Network Security" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "Government Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of 50+ critical security vulnerabilities discovered in Flock Safety ALPR cameras including hardcoded passwords, lack of encryption, unauthorized data collection, and physical access exploits based on independent security research.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.
